title: NIT Kurukshetra Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online For Junior Research Fellow /Project Associate I Post
short_info: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra) Junior Research Fellow /Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Kurukshetra. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow /Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation is applicable by 5 years in case of SC/ST/OBC/Female and PH Candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. and M.Tech. or equivalent degree in Computer Science and Engineering/ Computer Engineering/ Information Technology or equivalent with First class (6.5 grades point out of 10) or 60% marks.
qualification.details: B.Tech. and M.Tech. or equivalent degree in Computer Science and Engineering/ Computer Engineering/ Information Technology or equivalent with First class (6.5 grades point out of 10) or 60% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: Rs 37000 (1st & 2nd Year) and Rs 42000 (3rd Year) per month + HRA. Project Associate-I: Rs. 30,000 per month + HRA.
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs 37000 (1st & 2nd Year) and Rs 42000 (3rd Year) per month + HRA. Project Associate-I: Rs. 30,000 per month + HRA.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Kurukshetra to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Kurukshetra JRF/Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I positions at NIT Kurukshetra is 07 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech. and M.Tech. or equivalent degree in Computer Science and Engineering/ Computer Engineering/ Information Technology or equivalent with First class (6.5 grades point out of 10) or 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 32 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/Female and PH candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF and Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: For JRF, the salary is Rs 37000 (1st & 2nd Year) and Rs 42000 (3rd Year) per month + HRA. For Project Associate-I, the salary is Rs. 30,000 per month + HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I position.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: NIT Kurukshetra is located in Kurukshetra, Haryana, with the pincode 136119.
